name: quioteframework/db-propulsion
description: Propulsion (Propel 1 fork) driver adapter for Quiote's database layer.

extra.quiote-monorepo-note: Developed in-tree under quioteframework/quiote's packages/db-propulsion/; split to this standalone repo via splitsh/lite on tag push. PRs go to the monorepo, not here.
